# opnsense_kea_ha_peer (Data Source)

Reads a Kea High Availability peer on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) Unique name of the HA peer (must match the server name).
- `role` (String) HA role: primary or standby.
- `url` (String) Control-agent URL of the peer.
